emails.subject: Form 4 Reminder for April
emails.body: do I need to do anything? I believe the only transaction I had was related to a set of shares which were released to me earlier in the year. Some of the shares were sold at that time to pay the income tax on the distribution. We discussed this before and my recollection is I did not have to make a filing. Could you confirm by e-mail? Forwarded by Steven J Kean/HOU/EES on 04/20/2000 11:50 AM Rebecca Carter@ENRON 04/20/2000 09:58 AM Sent by: Kelly Johnson@ENRON

emails.subject: Re: Form 4 Reminder for April
emails.body: Re: Form 4 Reminder for April Hi Steve, I am not aware of any transactions such as stock option exercises, etc. which have to be reported by May 10. Thanks for focusing on this matter each month. Elaine Steven J Kean@EES 04/20/2000 11:52 AM
